_comment: Opportunity: Broken Formation. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 5000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Core Formation), perception (Nascent Soul (to perceive the formation's logic)), and luck (modifier 1.2). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Broken Formation
description: An ancient formation that has partially collapsed, leaving gaps. Exists because: formations degrade over millennia; parts still hold power.
perception_required: Nascent Soul (to perceive the formation's logic)
why_untaken: Requires formation expertise to safely navigate; most cultivators avoid broken formations.
natural_next_event: Formation continues to degrade; eventually collapses entirely.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
